commonQuestions.question: What is CoinEx?
commonQuestions.answer: Founded December 2017 by Haipo Yang (ViaBTC founder). Part of the ViaBTC Group ecosystem. Known as the first exchange to list BCH (Bitcoin Cash). Serves 10M+ users in 200+ countries. Focuses on transparency: one of earliest PoR publishers. Native token CET. Has own AMM and CoinEx Smart Chain.

commonQuestions.question: Is CoinEx safe?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx is a mid-tier centralized exchange.   Like all CEXs, funds are custodied by the exchange — use hardware wallets for long-term storage. Enable 2FA, use a strong unique password, and whitelist withdrawal addresses where available. Never share API keys.

commonQuestions.question: What is the CoinEx promo/referral code?
commonQuestions.answer: The CryptoBonusWorld referral code for CoinEx is 2my4f. It is pre-filled automatically when you register via our link. Using it activates the welcome bonus of up to 500 USDT.

commonQuestions.question: How much is the CoinEx welcome bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Via CryptoBonusWorld, the current CoinEx welcome bonus is up to 500 USDT. This is a task-based reward: completing KYC, making a qualifying deposit, and reaching trading volume milestones unlocks different reward tiers. The full amount requires all milestones — most users completing a standard deposit earn a meaningful first-week reward. Bonus amounts are typically trading fee vouchers, not withdrawable cash.

commonQuestions.question: How do I claim the CoinEx bonus?
commonQuestions.answer: Step 1: Click the registration link on the CryptoBonusWorld CoinEx page — the referral code/link is pre-filled. Step 2: Complete email/phone verification. Step 3: Complete KYC identity verification (required for bonuses). Step 4: Make a qualifying deposit (crypto transfer or card). Step 5: Check your Rewards Center / Bonus Hub for active tasks and complete trading volume milestones within the campaign window (usually 30 days). Vouchers are credited to your account as you complete each task tier.

commonQuestions.question: What are CoinEx spot trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx spot trading fees: 0% maker / 0.1% taker (standard).

commonQuestions.question: What are CoinEx futures trading fees?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx USDT-margined perpetual futures: 0.03% maker / 0.05% taker. Maximum leverage: 100×. Futures trading carries substantial risk of capital loss from liquidation. Up to 100× leverage available.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx have P2P trading?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx does not currently offer P2P trading.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx have copy trading?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx does not currently offer copy trading.

commonQuestions.question: Is CoinEx available in the United States?
commonQuestions.answer: No. CoinEx restricts US residents from registering. US users should use Coinbase or Kraken as regulated alternatives.

commonQuestions.question: Is CoinEx available in the United Kingdom?
commonQuestions.answer: UK availability for CoinEx should be verified on the official website, as FCA compliance and local regulatory status may affect service availability.

commonQuestions.question: What cryptocurrencies does CoinEx support?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx lists 1300 cryptocurrencies across 1900 trading pairs. CoinEx regularly lists emerging altcoins alongside major assets.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx have a mobile app?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. CoinEx has official iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play) apps. Download from the official CoinEx website (https://www.coinex.com/app or equivalent) or directly from the official app store listing to avoid counterfeit apps.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx require KYC?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx allows basic trading without KYC. However, higher withdrawal limits and bonus claims typically require identity verification.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx have Proof of Reserves?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx does not currently publish Proof of Reserves. Use caution with large balances on any exchange without PoR.

commonQuestions.question: What leverage does CoinEx offer?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx offers up to 100× leverage on futures. Standard: 10–20× for most trading pairs. High leverage available — suitable only for experienced traders with strict risk management. Leverage availability varies by asset and KYC level.

commonQuestions.question: When was CoinEx founded and who founded it?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx was founded in 2017. Founder & CEO: Haipo Yang (also founded ViaBTC mining pool).

commonQuestions.question: How many users does CoinEx have?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx serves 10M+ registered users across 200+ countries as of 2026.

commonQuestions.question: What is CoinEx's 24-hour trading volume?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx's 24-hour spot trading volume is approximately $0.10B (1657 BTC) as of the last data pull (2026-06-08). This places CoinEx at CoinGecko rank #N/A by trust-adjusted volume.

commonQuestions.question: Does CoinEx have a native token?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. CoinEx's native token is CET. Use: Fee discount, staking, Mining allocation, CoinEx Smart Chain gas.

commonQuestions.question: What is CoinEx's CoinGecko trust score?
commonQuestions.answer: CoinEx is not listed on CoinGecko (or trust score data was unavailable at last data pull).
